learnings: Added -WorkItemId optional parameter; graceful degradation when absent or ado-tasks.json missing
ADO task set to Active immediately before the inner execution loop for each state file
ADO task set to Closed after inner loop only when finalState.completed is true
Learnings posted as a single comment on the ADO Task using az boards work-item comment add
org/project fall back to ado-tasks.json values if not passed as parameters
manual_testing_steps: Run the loop WITHOUT -WorkItemId — verify existing StateDir behavior is completely unchanged.
Run with a valid ado-tasks.json and -WorkItemId — verify each task transitions to Active before its plan runs.
After each plan completes (completed=true in state.json), verify the ADO task is set to Closed.
Verify learnings are posted as a comment on each closed ADO Task.
Simulate a stuck loop (state never advances) — verify the task remains Active and is NOT closed.
